paramTags.comment: {@code (maxUlps - 1)} is the number of floating point values between the real (resp. imaginary) parts of {@code x} and {@code y}.

returnTag.comment: true if the values are equal.
true if the values are two adjacent floating point numbers or they are within range of each other.

returnTag.comment: true} if the values are two adjacent floating point numbers or they are within range of each other.
